message:
feat(gateway): add idempotency middleware for safe request retries

Implements request idempotency via Idempotency-Key header:
- Caches responses for POST/PUT/PATCH requests with idempotency keys
- Request fingerprinting to detect mismatched replay attempts
- Concurrent request handling (blocks duplicates until first completes)
- Configurable TTL, methods, and exclude paths
- In-memory store with automatic expiration cleanup
- 23 new tests for middleware functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
